# BP-131 positive variant: QueryContext receives a literal INSERT without RETURNING.
lang: go
file: BP-131-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: query-context
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
)

func create(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, name string) error {
	_, err := db.QueryContext(ctx, "INSERT INTO accounts(name) VALUES (?)", name)
	if err != nil {
		return fmt.Errorf("create: %w", err)
	}
	return nil
}
